seo.metaDescription: Full stack developer for hire. I build web products, MVPs, and integrations — with Web3 experience when your roadmap needs it. Based in Cayambe, Ecuador.
seo.keywords: freelance developer, full stack developer, Next.js, React, Ecuador, Cayambe, web development, freelance, Bertil Tandayamo, software engineer

home.servicesLead: Clear communication, predictable delivery, and code you can build on.

serviceItems.title: Web products & MVPs
serviceItems.body: Next.js and React apps from idea to production — performance, SEO, and maintainable architecture.

serviceItems.title: Frontend & integrations
serviceItems.body: APIs, auth flows, dashboards, and third-party services wired up with solid UX.

serviceItems.title: Blockchain & Web3
serviceItems.body: When your product needs it: smart-contract–backed experiences, marketplaces, and wallets — scoped and documented.

home.projectsSubtitle: Recent builds for clients and products.
home.web3Subtitle: Marketplaces and on-chain products — available as a dedicated capability alongside traditional web work.
home.contactBody: Tell me about your timeline, stack, and goals. I usually reply within one business day.
